action: sudo sh -c 'for d in /sys/bus/usb/devices/usb*; do echo 0 > $d/authorized; done'
echo 'ACTION=="add", SUBSYSTEM=="usb", ATTR{authorized}="0"' | sudo tee /etc/udev/rules.d/99-usbblock.rules && sudo udevadm control --reload-rules && sudo udevadm trigger
echo "blacklist usb_storage" | sudo tee -a /etc/modprobe.d/blacklist.conf && sudo modprobe -r usb_storage
echo "blacklist usbhid" | sudo tee -a /etc/modprobe.d/blacklist.conf && sudo modprobe -r usbhid

echo "blacklist usbcore" | sudo tee -a /etc/modprobe.d/blacklist.conf && sudo modprobe -r usbcore && echo "blacklist usb_common" | sudo tee -a /etc/modprobe.d/blacklist.conf && sudo modprobe -r usb_common

sudo tee /etc/systemd/system/usbblock.service <<'EOF'
[Unit]
Description=Block USB devices
After=multi-user.target
[Service]
Type=oneshot
ExecStart=/usr/bin/bash -c 'for d in /sys/bus/usb/devices/usb*; do echo 0 > $d/authorized; done'
[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
EOF
&& sudo systemctl daemon-reload && sudo systemctl enable usbblock.service && sudo systemctl start usbblock.service
sudo systemctl daemon-reload && sudo systemctl enable usbblock.service && sudo systemctl start usbblock.service
echo "password" | sudo -S systemctl daemon-reload && echo "password" | sudo -S systemctl enable usbblock.service && echo "password" | sudo -S systemctl start usbblock.service
